final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for a cross-border e-commerce promotion campaign.

Style/medium: complex promotional poster with artistic typography and layered text stacking
Composition: 16:9 horizontal layout; product or hero subject overlapping and partially obscuring background typographic layers; visually busy but organized hierarchy
Subject: cross-border e-commerce promotional products (hero product or subject placed prominently)
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: artistic lettering with stacked/overlapping typography; product or main subject must physically overlap and cover portions of the text layers; composition must feel rich and complex but not chaotic — clear visual hierarchy required
Avoid: plain flat layout with no text layering; empty or sparse composition; cluttered mess with no hierarchy
